name: Donna Miller
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Donna Miller is a Cook County Board Commissioner (District 6, south suburban Cook County, since 2018) running for the open IL-02 Congressional seat vacated by Robin Kelly. She is one of approximately 10 candidates in a crowded Democratic primary for a D+18 district covering the South Side of Chicago and south suburbs. (Source: WTTW Voter Guide 2026; Chicago Sun-Times; ILSOS filing confirmed)
